                "text": "// src/sessions-send.ts - 使用 Gateway 方式将消息发送给 Agent 并处理回复\n\nimport type { PluginRuntime, ReplyPayload } from \"openclaw/plugin-sdk\";\n\ninterface SessionsSendOptions {\n  sessionKey: string;\n  message: string;\n  cfg: any;\n  runtime: PluginRuntime;\n  channel: string;\n  accountId: string;\n  from: string;\n  chatId: string;\n  chatType: string;\n  log?: any;\n}\n\n/**\n * 发送消息到 Agent 并自动将回复路由到目标渠道\n * \n * 流程:\n * 1. 构建 inbound context\n * 2. 创建 reply dispatcher（使用 runtime.channel.reply.createReplyDispatcher）\n * 3. 调用 dispatchReplyFromConfig 发送消息给 Agent\n * 4. dispatcher 的 deliver 回调会将 Agent 回复发送到目标渠道\n */\nexport async function sessionsSend(options: SessionsSendOptions): Promise<void> {\n  const { sessionKey, message, cfg, runtime, channel, accountId, from, chatId, chatType, log } = options;\n\n  // 构建 envelope\n  const body = runtime.channel.reply.formatAgentEnvelope({\n    channel: '微妞AI',\n    from: from,\n    timestamp: new Date(),\n    body: message,\n  });\n\n  // 构建 inbound context\n  const inboundCtx = runtime.channel.reply.finalizeInboundContext({\n    Body: body,\n    BodyForAgent: message,\n    From: from,\n    To: chatId,\n    SessionKey: sessionKey,\n    AccountId: accountId,\n    Provider: channel,\n    Surface: channel,\n    ChatType: chatType,\n    SenderId: from,\n    SenderName: from,\n    Timestamp: Date.now(),\n    CommandAuthorized: true,\n    OriginatingChannel: 'wegirl-connector',\n    OriginatingTo: from,\n  });\n\n  log?.info?.(`[sessionsSend] dispatching to agent (session=${sessionKey})`);\n\n  // 创建 reply dispatcher\n  // deliver 回调会在 Agent 回复时被调用\n  const { dispatcher, replyOptions, markDispatchIdle } = runtime.channel.reply.createReplyDispatcherWithTyping({\n    deliver: async (payload: ReplyPayload, info: { kind: 'tool' | 'block' | 'final' }) => {\n      const text = payload.text ?? '';\n      if (!text.trim()) {\n        log?.info?.(`[sessionsSend] deliver called with empty text, kind=${info?.kind}`);\n        return;\n      }\n\n      log?.info?.(`[sessionsSend] deliver called, kind=${info?.kind}, text=${text.substring(0, 50)}...`);\n\n      // 只处理最终回复 (final)\n      if (info?.kind !== 'final') {\n        log?.info?.(`[sessionsSend] skipping non-final reply, kind=${info?.kind}`);\n        return;\n      }\n\n      log?.info?.(`[sessionsSend] Agent final reply: ${text}`);\n    },\n    onError: (error: any, info: { kind: string }) => {\n      log?.error?.(`[sessionsSend] deliver error, kind=${info?.kind}: ${error}`);\n    },\n  });\n\n  // 调用 dispatchReplyFromConfig 发送消息\n  const { queuedFinal, counts } = await runtime.channel.reply.dispatchReplyFromConfig({\n    ctx: inboundCtx,\n    cfg,\n    dispatcher,\n    replyOptions,\n  });\n\n  markDispatchIdle();\n\n  log?.info?.(`[sessionsSend] dispatch complete (queuedFinal=${queuedFinal}, replies=${counts.final})`);\n}\n"

{\n  sessionKey: string;\n  message: string;\n  cfg: any;\n  runtime: PluginRuntime;\n  channel: string;\n  accountId: string;\n  from: string;\n  chatId: string;\n  chatType: string;\n  log?: any;\n}\n\n/**\n * 从 session 历史中获取 Agent 的最新回复\n */\nasync function getAgentReplyFromSession(\n  runtime: PluginRuntime,\n  sessionKey: string,\n  beforeTimestamp: number\n): Promise<string | null> {\n  try {\n    // 读取 session 历史\n    const history = await runtime.readSessionHistory?.(sessionKey);\n    if (!history || !Array.isArray(history.messages)) {\n      return null;\n    }\n\n    // 查找最新的 assistant 回复（在 beforeTimestamp 之后）\n    for (let i = history.messages.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {\n      const msg = history.messages[i];\n      if (msg.role === 'assistant' && msg.timestamp > beforeTimestamp) {\n        // 提取文本内容\n        if (Array.isArray(msg.content)) {\n          const textParts = msg.content\n            .filter((part: any) => part.type === 'text')\n            .map((part: any) => part.text);\n          return textParts.join('\\n');\n        }\n        return msg.content;\n      }\n    }\n    return null;\n  } catch (err) {\n    return null;\n  }\n}\n\n/**\n * 发送消息到 Agent 并自动将回复路由到目标渠道\n * \n * 流程:\n * 1. 构建 inbound context\n * 2. 调用 dispatchReplyFromConfig 发送消息给 Agent\n * 3. 从 session 历史读取 Agent 回复\n * 4. 将回复发送到目标渠道\n */\nexport async function beforeTimestamp = Date.now();\n\n  // 构建 envelope\n  const body = runtime.channel.reply.formatAgentEnvelope({\n    channel: '微妞AI',\n    from: from,\n    timestamp: new Date(),\n    body: message,\n CommandAuthorized: true,\n    OriginatingChannel: 'wegirl-connector',\n    OriginatingTo: from,\n  });\n\n  log?.info?.(`[sessionsSend] dispatching to agent (session=${sessionKey})`);\n\n  // 创建空的 dispatcher（我们不依赖回调，而是从 session 历史读取回复）\n  const { dispatcher, replyOptions, markDispatchIdle } = runtime.channel.reply.createReplyDispatcherWithTyping({\n    deliver: async (payload: ReplyPayload, runtime.channel.reply.dispatchReplyFromConfig({\n    ctx: inboundCtx,\n    cfg,\n    dispatcher,\n    replyOptions,\n  });\n\n  markDispatchIdle();\n\n  // 等待一段时间让 Agent 生成回复\n getAgentReplyFromSession(runtime, sessionKey, beforeTimestamp);\n\n  if (agentReply) {\n    log?.info?.(`[sessionsSend] got agent reply: ${agentReply.substring(0, 50)}...`);\n    // TODO: 发送回复到目标渠道\n 只记录日志，不实际发送\n  const { dispatcher, replyOptions, markDispatchIdle } = runtime.channel.reply.createReplyDispatcherWithTyping({\n    deliver: async (payload, info) => {\n      log?.info?.(`[sessionsSend] agent reply: kind=${info?.kind}, text=${payload.text?.substring(0, 50)}`);\n    },\n    onError: (error, info) => {\n      log?.error?.(`[sessionsSend] deliver error: ${error}`);\n    },\n  });\n\n  // 调用 dispatchReplyFromConfig 发送消息给 Agent\n  const result = await runtime.channel.reply.dispatchReplyFromConfig({\n    ctx: inboundCtx,\n    cfg,\n    dispatcher,\n    replyOptions,\n  });\n\n  markDispatchIdle();\n\n  log?.info?.(`[sessionsSend] dispatch complete (queuedFinal=${result.queuedFinal}, replies=${result.counts.final})`);\n}\n",

                "text": "// src/sessions-send.ts - 发送消息到 Agent\n\nimport type { PluginRuntime } from \"openclaw/plugin-sdk\";\n\ninterface SessionsSendOptions {\n  sessionKey: string;\n  message: string;\n  cfg: any;\n  runtime: PluginRuntime;\n  channel: string;\n  accountId: string;\n  from: string;\n  chatId: string;\n  chatType: string;\n  log?: any;\n}\n\n/**\n * 发送消息到 Agent\n * \n * 注意：此方法只负责将消息发送给 Agent，不处理回复。\n * Agent 的回复需要通过其他机制（如 Feishu 的 webhook）捕获和处理。\n */\nexport async function sessionsSend(options: SessionsSendOptions): Promise<void> {\n  const { sessionKey, message, cfg, runtime, channel, accountId, from, chatId, chatType, log } = options;\n\n  // 构建 envelope\n  const body = runtime.channel.reply.formatAgentEnvelope({\n    channel: '微妞AI',\n    from: from,\n    timestamp: new Date(),\n    body: message,\n  });\n\n  // 构建 inbound context\n  const messageId = `wegirl-${Date.now()}`;\n  const inboundCtx = runtime.channel.reply.finalizeInboundContext({\n    Body: body,\n    BodyForAgent: message,\n    RawBody: message,\n    CommandBody: message,\n    From: from,\n    To: chatId,\n    SessionKey: sessionKey,\n    AccountId: accountId,\n    Provider: channel,\n    Surface: channel,\n    ChatType: chatType,\n    GroupSubject: chatType === 'group' ? chatId : undefined,\n    SenderId: from,\n    SenderName: from,\n    MessageSid: messageId,\n    Timestamp: Date.now(),\n    WasMentioned: true,\n    CommandAuthorized: true,\n    OriginatingChannel: channel,\n    OriginatingTo: chatId,\n  });\n\n  log?.info?.(`[sessionsSend] dispatching to agent (session=${sessionKey})`);\n\n  // 创建 dispatcher - 只记录日志，不实际发送\n  const { dispatcher, replyOptions, markDispatchIdle } = runtime.channel.reply.createReplyDispatcherWithTyping({\n    deliver: async (payload, info) => {\n      log?.info?.(`[sessionsSend] agent reply: kind=${info?.kind}, text=${payload.text?.substring(0, 50)}`);\n    },\n    onError: (error, info) => {\n      log?.error?.(`[sessionsSend] deliver error: ${error}`);\n    },\n  });\n\n  // 调用 dispatchReplyFromConfig 发送消息给 Agent\n  const result = await runtime.channel.reply.dispatchReplyFromConfig({\n    ctx: inboundCtx,\n    cfg,\n    dispatcher,\n    replyOptions,\n  });\n\n  markDispatchIdle();\n\n  log?.info?.(`[sessionsSend] dispatch complete (queuedFinal=${result.queuedFinal}, replies=${result.counts.final})`);\n}\n"

                "type": "text",
                "text": "// src/sessions-send.ts - 发送消息到 Agent\n\nimport type { PluginRuntime } from \"openclaw/plugin-sdk\";\n\ninterface SessionsSendOptions {\n  sessionKey: string;\n  message: string;\n  cfg: any;\n  runtime: PluginRuntime;\n  channel: string;\n  accountId: string;\n  from: string;\n  chatId: string;\n  chatType: string;\n  log?: any;\n}\n\n/**\n * 发送消息到 Agent\n * \n * 注意：此方法只负责将消息发送给 Agent，不处理回复。\n * Agent 的回复需要通过其他机制（如 Feishu 的 webhook）捕获和处理。\n */\nexport async function sessionsSend(options: SessionsSendOptions): Promise<void> {\n  const { sessionKey, message, cfg, runtime, channel, accountId, from, chatId, chatType, log } = options;\n\n  // 构建 envelope\n  const body = runtime.channel.reply.formatAgentEnvelope({\n    channel: '微妞AI',\n    from: from,\n    timestamp: new Date(),\n    body: message,\n  });\n\n  // 构建 inbound context\n  const messageId = `wegirl-${Date.now()}`;\n  const inboundCtx = runtime.channel.reply.finalizeInboundContext({\n    Body: body,\n    BodyForAgent: message,\n    RawBody: message,\n    CommandBody: message,\n    From: from,\n    To: chatId,\n    SessionKey: sessionKey,\n    AccountId: accountId,\n    Provider: channel,\n    Surface: channel,\n    ChatType: chatType,\n    GroupSubject: chatType === 'group' ? chatId : undefined,\n    SenderId: from,\n    SenderName: from,\n    MessageSid: messageId,\n    Timestamp: Date.now(),\n    WasMentioned: true,\n    CommandAuthorized: true,\n    OriginatingChannel: channel,\n    OriginatingTo: chatId,\n  });\n\n  log?.info?.(`[sessionsSend] dispatching to agent (session=${sessionKey})`);\n\n  // 创建 dispatcher - 在 deliver 回调中将 Agent 回复发送到飞书\n  const { dispatcher, replyOptions, markDispatchIdle } = runtime.channel.reply.createReplyDispatcherWithTyping({\n    deliver: async (payload, info) => {\n      const text = payload.text ?? '';\n      log?.info?.(`[sessionsSend] agent reply: kind=${info?.kind}, text=${text?.substring(0, 50)}`);\n      \n      // 只处理最终回复，并发送到飞书\n      if (info?.kind === 'final' && text && channel === 'feishu') {\n        try {\n          const { createRequire } = await import('node:module');\n          const require = createRequire(import.meta.url);\n          const lark = require('@larksuiteoapi/node-sdk');\n          \n          const feishuCfg = accountId === 'default' \n            ? cfg.channels?.feishu \n            : cfg.channels?.feishu?.accounts?.[accountId];\n          \n          if (!feishuCfg?.appId || !feishuCfg?.appSecret) {\n            throw new Error(`Feishu account ${accountId} not configured`);\n          }\n\n          const client = new lark.Client({\n            appId: feishuCfg.appId,\n            appSecret: feishuCfg.appSecret,\n            domain: feishuCfg.domain === 'lark' ? lark.Domain.Lark : lark.Domain.Feishu,\n          });\n\n          const receiveIdType = chatId.startsWith('oc_') ? 'chat_id' : 'open_id';\n          const response: any = await client.im.message.create({\n            params: { receive_id_type: receiveIdType },\n            data: {\n              receive_id: chatId,\n              content: JSON.stringify({ text }),\n              msg_type: 'text',\n            },\n          });\n\n          if (response.code !== 0) {\n            throw new Error(`Feishu send failed: ${response.msg}`);\n          }\n\n          log?.info?.(`[sessionsSend] Reply sent to Feishu: ${chatId}`);\n        } catch (err: any) {\n          log?.error?.(`[sessionsSend] Failed to send to Feishu: ${err.message}`);\n        }\n      }\n    },\n    onError: (error, info) => {\n      log?.error?.(`[sessionsSend] deliver error: ${error}`);\n    },\n  });\n\n  // 调用 dispatchReplyFromConfig 发送消息给 Agent\n  const result = await runtime.channel.reply.dispatchReplyFromConfig({\n    ctx: inboundCtx,\n    cfg,\n    dispatcher,\n    replyOptions,\n  });\n\n  markDispatchIdle();\n\n  log?.info?.(`[sessionsSend] dispatch complete (queuedFinal=${result.queuedFinal}, replies=${result.counts.final})`);\n}\n"

              {
                "type": "toolCall",
                "id": "tool20kRPN9SmkTYSXFrNzONEzQZ",
                "name": "write",
                "arguments": {
                  "content": "// src/sessions-send.ts - 发送消息到 Agent 并处理回复\n\nimport type { PluginRuntime } from \"openclaw/plugin-sdk\";\n\ninterface SessionsSendOptions {\n  sessionKey: string;\n  message: string;\n  cfg: any;\n  runtime: PluginRuntime;\n  channel: string;\n  accountId: string;\n  from: string;\n  chatId: string;\n  chatType: string;\n  log?: any;\n}\n\n/**\n * 获取 Feishu 访问令牌\n */\nasync function getFeishuToken(appId: string, appSecret: string, log?: any): Promise<string | null> {\n  try {\n    const response = await fetch('https://open.feishu.cn/open-apis/auth/v3/tenant_access_token/internal', {\n      method: 'POST',\n      headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },\n      body: JSON.stringify({ app_id: appId, app_secret: appSecret }),\n    });\n    const data = await response.json() as any;\n    if (data.code !== 0) {\n      log?.error?.(`[getFeishuToken] Failed: ${data.msg}`);\n      return null;\n    }\n    return data.tenant_access_token;\n  } catch (err: any) {\n    log?.error?.(`[getFeishuToken] Error: ${err.message}`);\n    return null;\n  }\n}\n\n/**\n * 发送消息到 Feishu\n */\nasync function sendFeishuMessage(\n  token: string,\n  chatId: string,\n  text: string,\n  log?: any\n): Promise<boolean> {\n  try {\n    const receiveIdType = chatId.startsWith('oc_') ? 'chat_id' : 'open_id';\n    const response = await fetch(`https://open.feishu.cn/open-apis/im/v1/messages?receive_id_type=${receiveIdType}`, {\n      method: 'POST',\n      headers: {\n        'Authorization': `Bearer ${token}`,\n        'Content-Type': 'application/json',\n      },\n      body: JSON.stringify({\n        receive_id: chatId,\n        content: JSON.stringify({ text }),\n        msg_type: 'text',\n      }),\n    });\n    const data = await response.json() as any;\n    if (data.code !== 0) {\n      log?.error?.(`[sendFeishuMessage] Failed: ${data.msg}`);\n      return false;\n    }\n    return true;\n  } catch (err: any) {\n    log?.error?.(`[sendFeishuMessage] Error: ${err.message}`);\n    return false;\n  }\n}\n\n/**\n * 发送消息到 Agent 并自动将回复路由到目标渠道\n */\nexport async function sessionsSend(options: SessionsSendOptions): Promise<void> {\n  const { sessionKey, message, cfg, runtime, channel, accountId, from, chatId, chatType, log } = options;\n\n  // 获取飞书配置\n  let feishuToken: string | null = null;\n  if (channel === 'feishu') {\n    const feishuCfg = accountId === 'default' \n      ? cfg.channels?.feishu \n      : cfg.channels?.feishu?.accounts?.[accountId];\n    \n    if (feishuCfg?.appId && feishuCfg?.appSecret) {\n      feishuToken = await getFeishuToken(feishuCfg.appId, feishuCfg.appSecret, log);\n    } else {\n      log?.warn?.(`[sessionsSend] Feishu account ${accountId} not configured`);\n    }\n  }\n\n  // 构建 envelope\n  const body = runtime.channel.reply.formatAgentEnvelope({\n    channel: '微妞AI',\n    from: from,\n    timestamp: new Date(),\n    body: message,\n  });\n\n  // 构建 inbound context\n  const messageId = `wegirl-${Date.now()}`;\n  const inboundCtx = runtime.channel.reply.finalizeInboundContext({\n    Body: body,\n    BodyForAgent: message,\n    RawBody: message,\n    CommandBody: message,\n    From: from,\n    To: chatId,\n    SessionKey: sessionKey,\n    AccountId: accountId,\n    Provider: channel,\n    Surface: channel,\n    ChatType: chatType,\n    GroupSubject: chatType === 'group' ? chatId : undefined,\n    SenderId: from,\n    SenderName: from,\n    MessageSid: messageId,\n    Timestamp: Date.now(),\n    WasMentioned: true,\n    CommandAuthorized: true,\n    OriginatingChannel: channel,\n    OriginatingTo: chatId,\n  });\n\n  log?.info?.(`[sessionsSend] dispatching to agent (session=${sessionKey})`);\n\n  // 创建 dispatcher - 在 deliver 回调中将 Agent 回复发送到飞书\n  const { dispatcher, replyOptions, markDispatchIdle } = runtime.channel.reply.createReplyDispatcherWithTyping({\n    deliver: async (payload, info) => {\n      const text = payload.text ?? } from './runtime.js';\nimport type {\n  PluginConfig,\n  EventPayload,\n  PluginContext,\n  CleanupFunction,\n  ServiceConfig,\n} from './types.js';\n\nconst plugin = {\n  id: 'wegirl-connector',\n  name: 'wegirl-connector',\n  description: 'WeGirl Redis connector for OpenClaw',\n\n  register(context: PluginContext): void {\n    const logger = context.logger;\n    const pluginConfig = (context.runtime) {\n      // @ts-expect-error\n      setWeGirlRuntime(context.runtime);\n      logger.info('[WeGirl] Runtime saved to global');\n    } else {\n      logger.warn('[WeGirl] Runtime not available in context');\n    }\n\n    // eslint-disable-next-line @typescript-eslint/no-explicit-any\n    let redisClient: any = null;\n\n    async function initRedis(): Promise<void> {\n      const config = pluginConfig || {};\n      logger.info(`[WeGirl] Plugin config: ${JSON.stringify(config)}`);\n      \n      const db = config.redisDb ?? 0;\n\n      const baseUrl = config.redisUrl || 'redis://localhost:6379';\n      const url = baseUrl.includes('/') && !baseUrl.includes('://localhost:6379/')\n        ? baseUrl\n        : `${baseUrl.replace(/\\/$/, '').replace(/\\/\\d+$/, '')}/${db}`;\n\n      const redisOptions: any = {\n        url: url,\n        socket: {\n          reconnectStrategy: (retries: number) => Math.min(retries * 50, 500),\n          connectTimeout: 10000,\n        },\n      };\n\n      if (config.redisPassword) {\n        redisOptions.password = config.redisPassword;\n        logger.info('[WeGirl] Using Redis password from config');\n      } else {\n        logger.warn('[WeGirl] No Redis password in config');\n      }\n\n      redisClient = createClient(redisOptions);\n\n      redisClient.on('error', (err: Error) => {\n        logger.error('[WeGirl] Client Error:', err.message);\n      });\n\n      redisClient.on('connect', () => {\n        logger.info('[WeGirl] Client connected');\n      });\n\n      redisClient.on('reconnecting', () => {\n        logger.warn('[WeGirl] Reconnecting...');\n      });\n\n      await redisClient.connect();\n      logger.info('[WeGirl] Redis connected');\n    }\n\n    async function sortEventIdsByTime(ids: string[], keyPrefix: string, limit: number): Promise<string[]> {\n      if (ids.length === 0) return [];\n\n      const withTimestamps = await Promise.all(\n        ids.map(async (id) => {\n          const ts = await redisClient.zScore(`${keyPrefix}timeline`, id);\n          return { id, ts: ts || 0 };\n        })\n      );\n\n      return withTimestamps\n        .sort((a, b) => b.ts - a.ts)\n        .slice(0, limit)\n        .map(x => x.id);\n    }\n\n    async function persistEvent(eventType: string, payload: EventPayload): Promise<void> {\n      if (!redisClient?.isOpen) {\n        logger.warn('[WeGirl] Redis not connected, skipping persist');\n        return;\n      }\n\n      const timestamp = Date.now();\n      const eventId = randomUUID();\n      const keyPrefix = pluginConfig?.keyPrefix || 'openclaw:events:';\n\n      const sessionId = payload.sessionId || payload.conversationId || 'global';\n      const userId = payload.userId || payload.senderId || 'system';\n\n      const eventData = {\n        id: eventId,\n        type: eventType,\n        timestamp: timestamp.toString(),\n        payload: JSON.stringify(payload),\n        sessionId,\n        userId,\n      };\n\n      const multi = redisClient.multi();\n\n      multi.hSet(`${keyPrefix}data:${eventId}`, eventData);\n      multi.zAdd(`${keyPrefix}timeline`, { score: timestamp, value: eventId });\n      multi.sAdd(`${keyPrefix}type:${eventType}`, eventId);\n      multi.lPush(`${keyPrefix}session:${sessionId}`, eventId);\n      multi.lTrim(`${keyPrefix}session:${sessionId}`, 0, 999);\n      multi.sAdd(`${keyPrefix}user:${userId}`, eventId);\n\n      const ttl = pluginConfig?.ttl || 86400 * 7;\n      multi.expire(`${keyPrefix}data:${eventId}`, ttl);\n\n      await multi.exec();\n      logger.debug(`[WeGirl] Event persisted: ${eventId}`);\n    }\n\n    const messageHandlers = new Map<string, (message: any) => void>();\n\n    if (context) {\n      logger.info('[WeGirl] context available, registering event handlers');\n\n      context.registerChannel({ plugin: wegirlPlugin });\n      logger.info('[WeGirl] Channel registered, waiting for Gateway to start account...');\n\n      if (typeof context.registerHttpRoute === 'function') {\n        logger.info('[WeGirl] Registering HTTP route for message reception');\n\n        context.registerHttpRoute({\n          path: '/wegirl/webhook',\n          method: 'POST',\n          handler: async (req, res) => {\n            try {\n              if (req.method !== 'POST') {\n                res.status(405).json({ error: 'Method not allowed' });\n                return;\n              }\n\n              const data = JSON.parse(req.body);\n              logger.info('[WeGirl] Received webhook message:', JSON.stringify(data));\n\n              if (!data.content) {\n                res.status(400).json({ error: 'Missing content field' });\n                return;\n              }\n\n              const message = {\n                id: data.id || randomUUID(),\n                content: data.content,\n                from: data.from || 'anonymous',\n                to: data.to || 'wegirl-connector',\n                channelId: data.channelId || 'wegirl-connector',\n                accountId: data.accountId || 'default',\n                conversationId: data.conversationId || `wegirl:${data.from || 'anon'}`,\n                timestamp: data.timestamp || Date.now(),\n                metadata: data.metadata || {}\n              };\n\n              logger.info('[WeGirl] Processing message:', message.id);\n\n              if (redisClient?.isOpen) {\n                const keyPrefix = pluginConfig?.keyPrefix || 'openclaw:events:';\n                await redisClient.lPush(`${keyPrefix}inbox:messages`, JSON.stringify(message));\n                await redisClient.expire(`${keyPrefix}inbox:messages`, 86400);\n              }\n\n              res.status(200).json({\n                success: true,\n                messageId: message.id,\n                received: true\n              });\n            } catch (err: any) {\n              logger.error('[WeGirl] Webhook error:', err.message);\n              res.status(500).json({ error: err.message || 'Internal error' });\n            }\n          }\n        });\n\n        logger.info('[WeGirl] HTTP route registered: POST /wegirl/webhook');\n      } else {\n        logger.warn('[WeGirl] registerHttpRoute not available');\n      }\n\n      context.registerService({\n        id: 'wegirl',\n        start: async () => {\n          await initRedis().catch((err: Error) => {\n            logger.error('[WeGirl] Init failed:', err.message);\n          });\n          return () => redisClient?.quit();\n        }\n      } as ServiceConfig);\n\n      // 事件监听\n      context.on('before_agent_start', (event: any) => {\n        logger.debug('[WeGirl] Event: before_agent_start');\n        persistEvent('before_agent_start', event);\n      });\n\n      context.on('agent_end', (event: any) => {\n        logger.debug('[WeGirl] Event: agent_end');\n        persistEvent('agent_end', event);\n      });\n\n      context.on('subagent_spawning', (event: any) => {\n        logger.debug('[WeGirl] Event: subagent_spawning');\n        persistEvent('subagent_spawning', event);\n      });\n\n      context.on('agent_error', (event: any) => {\n        logger.error(`[WeGirl] Event: agent_error, error=${event?.error || 'unknown'}`);\n        persistEvent('agent_error', event);\n      });\n\n      context.on('message_received', (event: any) => {\n        const content = event?.content || '';\n        const preview = typeof content === 'string' ? content.substring(0, 100) : JSON.stringify(content).substring(0, 100);\n        logger.info(`[WeGirl] Event: message_received, content=${preview}${content.length > 100 ? '...' : ''}`);\n        persistEvent('message_received', event);\n      });\n\n      context.on('message_sent', (event: any) => {\n        logger.info(`[WeGirl] Event: message_sent, session=${event?.sessionId || 'unknown'}`);\n        persistEvent('message_sent', event);\n      });\n\n      context.on('llm_input', (event: any) => {\n        logger.debug('[WeGirl] Event: llm_input');\n        persistEvent('llm_input', event);\n      });\n\n      context.on('llm_output', (event: any) => {\n        logger.debug('[WeGirl] Event: llm_output');\n        persistEvent('llm_output', event);\n      });\n\n      context.on('llm_error', (event: any) => {\n        logger.error(`[WeGirl] Event: llm_error, error=${event?.error || 'unknown'}`);\n        persistEvent('llm_error', event);\n      });\n\n      context.on('before_tool_call', (event: any) => {\n        const toolName = event?.toolName || event?.tool || 'unknown';\n        logger.debug(`[WeGirl] Event: before_tool_call, tool=${toolName}`);\n        persistEvent('before_tool_call', {\n          ...event,\n          toolName: toolName,\n        });\n      });\n\n      context.on('after_tool_call', (event: any) => {\n        const toolName = event?.toolName || event?.tool || 'unknown';\n        logger.debug(`[WeGirl] Event: after_tool_call, tool=${toolName}`);\n        persistEvent('after_tool_call', {\n          ...event,\n          toolName: toolName,\n          params: event.params,\n          result: event.result,\n          duration: event.duration,\n   });\n\n      context.on('session_ended', (event: any) => {\n        logger.info('[WeGirl] Event: session_ended', event?.sessionId);\n        persistEvent('session_ended', {\n          ...event,\n          sessionId: event.sessionId,\n          messageCount: event.messageCount,\n          model: event.model,\n          promptTokens: event.promptTokens,\n          completionTokens: context.on('plugin_loaded', (event: any) => {\n        logger.info('[WeGirl] Event: plugin_loaded', event?.pluginId);\n        persistEvent('plugin_loaded', event);\n      });\n\n      context.on('plugin_unload', (event: any) => {\n        logger.info('[WeGirl] Event: plugin_unload', event?.pluginId);\n        persistEvent('plugin_unload', event);\n      });\n\n      // Gateway 方法\n      if (typeof context.registerGatewayMethod === 'function') {\n        logger.info('[WeGirl] Registering Gateway methods');\n\n        context.registerGatewayMethod('wegirl.recent', async ({ respond, params }) => {\n          logger.info('[WeGirl] Method called: wegirl.recent');\n\n          if (!redisClient?.isOpen) {\n            respond(false, { error: 'Redis not connected' });\n            return;\n          }\n\n          try {\n            const { limit = 10, type, session } = (params || {}) as { limit?: number; type?: string; session?: string };\n            const keyPrefix = pluginConfig?.keyPrefix || 'openclaw:events:';\n\n            let eventIds: string[];\n\n            if (session) {\n              eventIds = await redisClient.lRange(`${keyPrefix}session:${session}`, keyPrefix, Math.abs(limit));\n            } else if (limit < 0) {\n              const allIds = await redisClient.zRange(`${keyPrefix}timeline`, 0, -1);\n              const index = allIds.length + limit;\n              eventIds = index >= 0 ? [allIds[index]] : [];\n            } else {\n              eventIds = await redisClient.zRange(`${keyPrefix}timeline`, -limit, -1);\n            }\n\n            const events = await Promise.all(\n              eventIds.map(async (id) => {\n                const data = await redisClient.hGetAll(`${keyPrefix}data:${id}`);\n                return {\n                  id: data.id,\n                  type: data.type,\n                  timestamp: parseInt(data.timestamp),\n                  payload: JSON.parse(data.payload || '{}'),\n                  sessionId: data.sessionId,\n                  userId: data.userId,\n                };\n              })\n            );\n\n            respond(true, { events, total: events.length });\n          } catch (err: any) {\n            logger.error('[WeGirl] recent method error:', err.message);\n            respond(false, { error: err.message || 'Unknown error' });\n          }\n        });\n\n        context.registerGatewayMethod('wegirl.stats', async ({ respond }: { respond: any }) => {\n          if (!redisClient?.isOpen) {\n            respond(false, { error: 'Redis not connected' });\n            return;\n          }\n\n          const keyPrefix = pluginConfig?.keyPrefix || 'openclaw:events:';\n\n          const types = [\n            'before_agent_start', 'agent_end', 'subagent_spawning', 'agent_error',\n            'message_received', 'message_sent',\n            'llm_input', 'llm_output', 'llm_error',\n            'before_tool_call', 'after_tool_call',\n            'session_created', 'session_ended',\n            'error', 'plugin_loaded', 'plugin_unload',\n          ];\n\n          const stats: Record<string, number> = {};\n\n          await Promise.all(\n            types.map(async (type) => {\n              stats[type] = await redisClient.sCard(`${keyPrefix}type:${type}`);\n            })\n          );\n\n          let sessionCount = 0;\n          const iterator = redisClient.scanIterator({\n            MATCH: `${keyPrefix}session:*`,\n            COUNT: 100,\n          });\n\n          for await (const _ of iterator) {\n            sessionCount++;\n          }\n\n          respond(true, {\n            stats,\n            totalSessions: sessionCount,\n            redisConnected: redisClient.isOpen,\n            timestamp: Date.now(),\n          });\n        });\n\n        context.registerGatewayMethod('wegirl.health', async ({ respond }: { respond: any }) => {\n          const isHealthy = redisClient?.isOpen ?? false;\n          if (isHealthy) {\n            await redisClient.ping();\n          }\n          respond(isHealthy, {\n            status: isHealthy ? 'healthy' : 'disconnected',\n            timestamp: Date.now(),\n          });\n        });\n\n        context.registerGatewayMethod('wegirl.replies', async ({ respond, params }) => {\n          logger.info('[WeGirl] Method called: wegirl.replies');\n\n          if (!redisClient?.isOpen) {\n            respond(false, { error: 'Redis not connected' });\n            return;\n          }\n\n          try {\n            const { session, limit = 10 } = (params || {}) as { session?: string; limit?: number };\n            const keyPrefix = pluginConfig?.keyPrefix || 'openclaw:events:';\n\n            if (!session) {\n              respond(false, { error: 'Missing required parameter: session' });\n              return;\n            }\n\n            const replyListKey = `${keyPrefix}replies:${session}`;\n            const replyData = await redisClient.lRange(replyListKey, 0, Math.abs(limit) - 1);\n\n            const replies = replyData.map((item: string) => {\n              try {\n                return JSON.parse(item);\n              } catch {\n                return { raw: item };\n              }\n            });\n\n            respond(true, {\n              session,\n              replies,\n              total: replies.length,\n              timestamp: Date.now(),\n            });\n          } catch (err: any) {\n            logger.error('[WeGirl] replies method error:', err.message);\n            respond(false, { error: err.message || 'Unknown error' });\n          }\n        });\n\n        logger.info('[WeGirl] Gateway methods registered');\n      } else {\n        logger.warn('[WeGirl] registerGatewayMethod not available');\n      }\n\n      logger.info('[WeGirl] Event handlers registered');\n    } else {\n      logger.info('[WeGirl] context not available, event persistence disabled');\n      logger.info('[WeGirl] Only basic Redis connection is active');\n    }\n\n    logger.info('[WeGirl] Plugin registered successfully');\n  },\n};\n\nexport default plugin;\n"

'chat_id' : 'open_id';\n    const response = await fetch(`https://open.feishu.cn/open-apis/im/v1/messages?receive_id_type=${receiveIdType}`, {\n      method: 'POST',\n      headers: {\n        'Authorization': `Bearer ${token}`,\n        'Content-Type': 'application/json',\n      },\n      body: JSON.stringify({\n        receive_id: chatId,\n        content: JSON.stringify({ text }),\n        msg_type: 'text',\n      }),\n    });\n    const data = await response.json() as any;\n    if (data.code !== 0) {\n      log?.error?.(`[sendFeishuMessage] Failed: ${data.msg}`);\n      return false;\n    }\n    return true;\n  } catch (err: any) {\n    log?.error?.(`[sendFeishuMessage] Error: ${err.message}`);\n    return false;\n  }\n}\n\n/**\n * 发送消息到 Agent 并自动将回复路由到目标渠道\n */\nexport async function sessionsSend(options: SessionsSendOptions): Promise<void> {\n  const { sessionKey, message, cfg, runtime, channel, accountId, from, chatId, chatType, log } = options;\n\n  // 获取飞书配置\n  let feishuToken: string | null = null;\n  if (channel === 'feishu') {\n    const feishuCfg = accountId === 'default' \n      ? cfg.channels?.feishu \n      : cfg.channels?.feishu?.accounts?.[accountId];\n    \n    if (feishuCfg?.appId && feishuCfg?.appSecret) {\n      feishuToken = await getFeishuToken(feishuCfg.appId, feishuCfg.appSecret, log);\n    } else {\n      log?.warn?.(`[sessionsSend] Feishu account ${accountId} not configured`);\n    }\n  }\n\n  // 构建 envelope\n  const body = runtime.channel.reply.formatAgentEnvelope({\n    channel: '微妞AI',\n    from: from,\n    timestamp: new Date(),\n    body: message,\n  });\n\n  // 构建 inbound context\n  const messageId = `wegirl-${Date.now()}`;\n  const inboundCtx = runtime.channel.reply.finalizeInboundContext({\n    Body: body,\n    BodyForAgent: message,\n    RawBody: message,\n    CommandBody: message,\n    From: from,\n    To: chatId,\n    SessionKey: sessionKey,\n    AccountId: accountId,\n    Provider: channel,\n    Surface: channel,\n    ChatType: chatType,\n    GroupSubject: chatType === 'group' ? chatId : undefined,\n    SenderId: from,\n    SenderName: from,\n    MessageSid: messageId,\n    Timestamp: Date.now(),\n    WasMentioned: true,\n    CommandAuthorized: true,\n    OriginatingChannel: channel,\n    OriginatingTo: chatId,\n  });\n\n  log?.info?.(`[sessionsSend] dispatching to agent (session=${sessionKey})`);\n\n  // 创建 dispatcher - 在 deliver 回调中将 Agent 回复发送到飞书\n  const { dispatcher, replyOptions, markDispatchIdle } = runtime.channel.reply.createReplyDispatcherWithTyping({\n    deliver: async (payload, info) => {\n      const text = payload.text ?? '';\n      log?.info?.(`[sessionsSend] agent reply: kind=${info?.kind}, text=${text?.substring(0, 50)}`);\n      \n      // 只处理最终回复，并发送到飞书\n      if (info?.kind === 'final' && text && feishuToken) {\n        const success = await sendFeishuMessage(feishuToken, chatId, text, log);\n        if (success) {\n          log?.info?.(`[sessionsSend] Reply sent to Feishu: ${chatId}`);\n        }\n      }\n    },\n    onError: (error, info) => {\n      log?.error?.(`[sessionsSend] deliver error: ${error}`);\n    },\n  });\n\n  // 调用 dispatchReplyFromConfig 发送消息给 Agent\n  const result = await runtime.channel.reply.dispatchReplyFromConfig({\n    ctx: inboundCtx,\n    cfg,\n    dispatcher,\n    replyOptions,\n  });\n\n  markDispatchIdle();\n\n  log?.info?.(`[sessionsSend] dispatch complete (queuedFinal=${result.queuedFinal}, replies=${result.counts.final})`);\n}\n"

              {
                "type": "text",
                "text": "看到问题了！你在 `persistEvent` 里面调用了 `context.registerService`：\n\n```typescript\nasync function persistEvent(eventType: string, payload: EventPayload): Promise<void> {\n  if (!redisClient?.isOpen) {\n    logger.warn('[WeGirl] Redis not connected, skipping persist');\n    context.registerService({  // ❌ 问题在这里\n      id: 'wegirl',\n      start: async () => {\n        await initRedis().catch((err: Error) => {\n          logger.error('[WeGirl] Redis init failed:', err.message);\n        });\n        return () => redisClient?.quit();\n      }\n    } as ServiceConfig);\n    return;\n  }\n  // ...\n}\n```\n\n**这会有问题：**\n\n1. **重复注册** - 每次事件触发且 Redis 未连接时，都会尝试注册一个 id 为 'wegirl' 的新服务，可能导致冲突\n2. **时机错误** - `registerService` 应该在 `register` 阶段调用，而不是在事件处理时动态注册\n3. **initRedis 调用时机** - `initRedis` 在 `persistEvent` 中被调用时，`pluginConfig` 等闭包变量可能不在正确的作用域\n\n**正确的做法：**\n\n`registerService` 应该只调用一次（在 `register` 阶段），`persistEvent` 只负责检测和警告：\n\n```typescript\n// register 阶段只调用一次\ncontext.registerService({\n  id: 'wegirl',\n  start: async () => {\n    await initRedis().catch((err: Error) => {\n      logger.error('[WeGirl] Redis init failed:', err.message);\n    });\n    return () => redisClient?.quit();\n  }\n} as ServiceConfig);\n\n// persistEvent 只检测和警告\nasync function persistEvent(eventType: string, payload: EventPayload): Promise<void> {\n  if (!redisClient?.isOpen) {\n    logger.warn('[WeGirl] Redis not connected, skipping persist');\n    return;\n  }\n  // ... 正常处理\n}\n```\n\n需要我帮你改回来吗？"

OpenClaw',\n\n  register(context: PluginContext): void {\n    const logger = context.logger;\n    const pluginConfig = context.pluginConfig;\n\n    logger.info('[WeGirl] Plugin registering...');\n\n         socket: {\n            reconnectStrategy: (retries: number) => Math.min(retries * 50, 500),\n            connectTimeout: 10000,\n          },\n        };\n\n        if (config.redisPassword) });\n\n        redisClient.on('connect', () => {\n          logger.info('[WeGirl] Client connected');\n        });\n\n        redisClient.on('reconnecting', () => {\n          logger.warn('[WeGirl] Reconnecting...');\n        });\n\n        await redisClient.connect();\n        redisConnected = true;\n        logger.info('[WeGirl] Redis connected');\n      })();\n\n      return   );\n\n      return withTimestamps\n        .sort((a, b) => b.ts - a.ts)\n        .slice(0, limit)\n        .map(x => x.id);\n    }\n\n    async function persistEvent(eventType: string, payload: setWeGirlRuntime } from './runtime.js';\nimport type {\n  PluginConfig,\n  EventPayload,\n  PluginContext,\n  CleanupFunction,\n  ServiceConfig,\n} from './types.js';\n\n// Redis 连接状态管理\nlet redisClient: any = null;\nlet redisConnectPromise: Promise<void> | null = null;\nlet redisConnected = false;\n\nconst plugin = {\n  id: 'wegirl-connector',\n  name: 'wegirl-connector',\n  description: 'WeGirl Redis connector for OpenClaw',\n\n  register(context: PluginContext): void {\n    const logger = context.logger;\n    const pluginConfig = context.pluginConfig;\n\n    logger.info('[WeGirl] Plugin registering...');\n\n    // 保存 runtime 到全局变量，供 channel.ts 使用\n    // @ts-expect-error - runtime 在 PluginContext 上但未在类型中定义\n    if (context.runtime) {\n      // @ts-expect-error\n      setWeGirlRuntime(context.runtime);\n      logger.info('[WeGirl] Runtime saved to global');\n    } else {\n      logger.warn('[WeGirl] Runtime not available in context');\n    }\n\n    async function initRedis(): Promise<void> {\n      if (redisConnectPromise) {\n        return redisConnectPromise;\n      }\n\n      redisConnectPromise = (async () => {\n        const config = pluginConfig || {};\n        logger.info(`[WeGirl] Plugin config: ${JSON.stringify(config)}`);\n\n        const db = config.redisDb ?? 0;\n\n        const baseUrl = config.redisUrl || 'redis://localhost:6379';\n        const url = baseUrl.includes('/') && !baseUrl.includes('://localhost:6379/')\n          ? baseUrl\n          : `${baseUrl.replace(/\\/$/, '').replace(/\\/\\d+$/, '')}/${db}`;\n\n        const redisOptions: any = {\n          url: url,\n          socket: {\n            reconnectStrategy: (retries: number) => Math.min(retries * 50, 500),\n            connectTimeout: 10000,\n          },\n        };\n\n        if (config.redisPassword) {\n          redisOptions.password = config.redisPassword;\n          logger.info('[WeGirl] Using Redis password from config');\n        } else {\n          logger.warn('[WeGirl] No Redis password in config');\n        }\n\n        redisClient = createClient(redisOptions);\n\n        redisClient.on('error', (err: Error) => {\n          logger.error('[WeGirl] Client Error:', err.message);\n        });\n\n        redisClient.on('connect', () => {\n          logger.info('[WeGirl] Client connected');\n        });\n\n        redisClient.on('reconnecting', () => {\n          logger.warn('[WeGirl] Reconnecting...');\n        });\n\n        await redisClient.connect();\n        redisConnected = true;\n        logger.info('[WeGirl] Redis connected');\n      })();\n\n      return redisConnectPromise;\n    }\n\n    async function sortEventIdsByTime(ids: string[], keyPrefix: string, limit: number): Promise<string[]> {\n      if (ids.length === 0) return [];\n\n      const withTimestamps = await Promise.all(\n        ids.map(async (id) => {\n          const ts = await redisClient.zScore(`${keyPrefix}timeline`, id);\n          return { id, ts: ts || 0 };\n        })\n      );\n\n      return withTimestamps\n        .sort((a, b) => b.ts - a.ts)\n        .slice(0, limit)\n        .map(x => x.id);\n    }\n\n    async function persistEvent(eventType: string, payload: EventPayload): Promise<void> {\n      // Redis 未连接时跳过并记录警告\n      // 注意：initRedis 只能通过 registerService 调用，不能在这里直接调用\n      if (!redisClient?.isOpen) {\n        logger.warn('[WeGirl] Redis not connected, skipping persist');\n        return;\n      }\n\n      const timestamp = Date.now();\n      const eventId = randomUUID();\n      const keyPrefix = pluginConfig?.keyPrefix || 'openclaw:events:';\n\n      const sessionId = payload.sessionId || payload.conversationId || 'global';\n      const userId = payload.userId || payload.senderId || 'system';\n\n      const eventData = {\n        id: eventId,\n        type: eventType,\n        timestamp: timestamp.toString(),\n        payload: JSON.stringify(payload),\n        sessionId,\n        userId,\n      };\n\n      const multi = redisClient.multi();\n\n      multi.hSet(`${keyPrefix}data:${eventId}`, eventData);\n      multi.zAdd(`${keyPrefix}timeline`, { score: timestamp, value: eventId });\n      multi.sAdd(`${keyPrefix}type:${eventType}`, eventId);\n      multi.lPush(`${keyPrefix}session:${sessionId}`, eventId);\n      multi.lTrim(`${keyPrefix}session:${sessionId}`, 0, 999);\n      multi.sAdd(`${keyPrefix}user:${userId}`, eventId);\n\n      const ttl = pluginConfig?.ttl || 86400 * 7;\n      multi.expire(`${keyPrefix}data:${eventId}`, ttl);\n\n      await multi.exec();\n      logger.debug(`[WeGirl] Event persisted: ${eventId}`);\n    }\n\n    const messageHandlers = new Map<string, (message: any) => void>();\n\n    if (context) {\n      logger.info('[WeGirl] context available, registering event handlers');\n\n      context.registerChannel({ plugin: wegirlPlugin });\n      logger.info('[WeGirl] Channel registered, waiting for Gateway to start account...');\n\n      if (typeof context.registerHttpRoute === 'function') {\n        logger.info('[WeGirl] Registering HTTP route for message reception');\n\n        context.registerHttpRoute({\n          path: '/wegirl/webhook',\n          method: 'POST',\n          handler: async (req, res) => {\n            try {\n              if (req.method !== 'POST') {\n                res.status(405).json({ error: 'Method not allowed' });\n                return;\n              }\n\n              const data = JSON.parse(req.body);\n              logger.info('[WeGirl] Received webhook message:', JSON.stringify(data));\n\n              if (!data.content) {\n                res.status(400).json({ error: 'Missing content field' });\n                return;\n              }\n\n              const message = {\n                id: data.id || randomUUID(),\n                content: data.content,\n                from: data.from || 'anonymous',\n                to: data.to || 'wegirl-connector',\n                channelId: data.channelId || 'wegirl-connector',\n                accountId: data.accountId || 'default',\n                conversationId: data.conversationId || `wegirl:${data.from || 'anon'}`,\n                timestamp: data.timestamp || Date.now(),\n                metadata: data.metadata || {}\n              };\n\n              logger.info('[WeGirl] Processing message:', message.id);\n\n              if (redisClient?.isOpen) {\n                const keyPrefix = pluginConfig?.keyPrefix || 'openclaw:events:';\n                await redisClient.lPush(`${keyPrefix}inbox:messages`, JSON.stringify(message));\n                await redisClient.expire(`${keyPrefix}inbox:messages`, 86400);\n              }\n\n              res.status(200).json({\n                success: true,\n                messageId: message.id,\n                received: true\n              });\n            } catch (err: any) {\n              logger.error('[WeGirl] Webhook error:', err.message);\n              res.status(500).json({ error: err.message || 'Internal error' });\n            }\n          }\n        });\n\n        logger.info('[WeGirl] HTTP route registered: POST /wegirl/webhook');\n      } else {\n        logger.warn('[WeGirl] registerHttpRoute not available');\n      }\n\n      // registerService 中初始化 Redis（唯一初始化入口）\n      context.registerService({\n        id: 'wegirl',\n        start: async () => {\n          await initRedis().catch((err: Error) => {\n            logger.error('[WeGirl] Redis init failed:', err.message);\n          });\n          return () => redisClient?.quit();\n        }\n      } as ServiceConfig);\n\n      // 事件监听\n      context.on('before_agent_start', (event: any) => {\n        logger.debug('[WeGirl] Event: before_agent_start');\n        persistEvent('before_agent_start', event);\n      });\n\n      context.on('agent_end', (event: any) => {\n        logger.debug('[WeGirl] Event: agent_end');\n        persistEvent('agent_end', event);\n      });\n\n      context.on('subagent_spawning', (event: any) => {\n        logger.debug('[WeGirl] Event: subagent_spawning');\n        persistEvent('subagent_spawning', event);\n      });\n\n      context.on('agent_error', (event: any) => {\n        logger.error(`[WeGirl] Event: agent_error, error=${event?.error || 'unknown'}`);\n        persistEvent('agent_error', event);\n      });\n\n      context.on('message_received', (event: any) => {\n        const content = event?.content || '';\n        const preview = typeof content === 'string' ? content.substring(0, 100) : JSON.stringify(content).substring(0, 100);\n        logger.info(`[WeGirl] Event: message_received, content=${preview}${content.length > 100 ? '...' : ''}`);\n        persistEvent('message_received', event);\n      });\n\n      context.on('message_sent', (event: any) => {\n        logger.info(`[WeGirl] Event: message_sent, session=${event?.sessionId || 'unknown'}`);\n        persistEvent('message_sent', event);\n      });\n\n      context.on('llm_input', (event: any) => {\n        logger.debug('[WeGirl] Event: llm_input');\n        persistEvent('llm_input', event);\n      });\n\n      context.on('llm_output', (event: any) => {\n        logger.debug('[WeGirl] Event: llm_output');\n        persistEvent('llm_output', event);\n      });\n\n      context.on('llm_error', (event: any) => {\n        logger.error(`[WeGirl] Event: llm_error, error=${event?.error || 'unknown'}`);\n        persistEvent('llm_error', event);\n      });\n\n      context.on('before_tool_call', (event: any) => {\n        const toolName = event?.toolName || event?.tool || 'unknown';\n        const params = persistEvent('before_tool_call', {\n          ...event,\n          toolName: toolName,\n          command: command,\n        });\n      });\n\n      context.on('after_tool_call', (event: any) => {\n        const toolName = event?.toolName || event?.tool || 'unknown';\n        const params = event?.params || {};\n        const command = params.command || 'N/A';\n        logger.debug(`[WeGirl] Event: after_tool_call, tool=${toolName}, command=${command}`);\n        persistEvent('after_tool_call', {\n          ...event,\n          toolName: toolName,\n          command: command,\n          params: session_ended', event?.sessionId);\n        persistEvent('session_ended', {\n          ...event,\n          sessionId: event.sessionId,\n          messageCount: event.messageCount,\n          model: event.model,\n          promptTokens: event.promptTokens,\n          completionTokens: event.completionTokens,\n          totalTokens: event.totalTokens,\n        });\n      });\n\n      context.on('error', (error: any) => {\n        logger.error('[WeGirl] Event: error', error?.message);\n        persistEvent('error', {\n          ...error,\n          content: error?.message || String(error),\n          raw: error,\n        });\n      });\n\n      context.on('plugin_loaded', (event: any) => {\n        logger.info('[WeGirl] Event: plugin_loaded', event?.pluginId);\n        persistEvent('plugin_loaded', event);\n      });\n\n      context.on('plugin_unload', (event: any) => {\n        logger.info('[WeGirl] Event: plugin_unload', event?.pluginId);\n        persistEvent('plugin_unload', event);\n      });\n\n      // Gateway 方法\n      if (typeof context.registerGatewayMethod === 'function') {\n        logger.info('[WeGirl] Registering Gateway methods');\n\n        context.registerGatewayMethod('wegirl.recent', async ({ respond, params }) => {\n          logger.info('[WeGirl] Method called: wegirl.recent');\n\n          if (!redisClient?.isOpen) {\n            respond(false, { error: 'Redis not connected' });\n            return;\n          }\n\n          try {\n            const { limit = 10, type, session } = (params || {}) as { limit?: number; type?: string; session?: string };\n            const keyPrefix = pluginConfig?.keyPrefix || 'openclaw:events:';\n\n            let eventIds: string[];\n\n            if (session) {\n              eventIds = await redisClient.lRange(`${keyPrefix}session:${session}`, 0, Math.abs(limit) - 1);\n            } else if (type) {\n              const ids = await redisClient.sMembers(`${keyPrefix}type:${type}`);\n              eventIds = await sortEventIdsByTime(ids, keyPrefix, Math.abs(limit));\n            } else if (limit < 0) {\n              const allIds = await redisClient.zRange(`${keyPrefix}timeline`, 0, -1);\n              const index = allIds.length + limit;\n              eventIds = index >= 0 ? [allIds[index]] : [];\n            } else {\n              eventIds = await redisClient.zRange(`${keyPrefix}timeline`, -limit, -1);\n            }\n\n            const events = await Promise.all(\n              eventIds.map(async (id) => {\n                const data = await redisClient.hGetAll(`${keyPrefix}data:${id}`);\n                return {\n                  id: data.id,\n                  type: data.type,\n                  timestamp: parseInt(data.timestamp),\n                  payload: JSON.parse(data.payload || '{}'),\n                  sessionId: data.sessionId,\n                  userId: data.userId,\n                };\n              })\n            );\n\n            respond(true, { events, total: events.length });\n          } catch (err: any) {\n            logger.error('[WeGirl] recent method error:', err.message);\n            respond(false, { error: err.message || 'Unknown error' });\n          }\n        });\n\n        context.registerGatewayMethod('wegirl.stats', async ({ respond }: { respond: any }) => {\n          if (!redisClient?.isOpen) {\n            respond(false, { error: 'Redis not connected' });\n            return;\n          }\n\n          const keyPrefix = pluginConfig?.keyPrefix || 'openclaw:events:';\n\n          const types = [\n            'before_agent_start', 'agent_end', 'subagent_spawning', 'agent_error',\n            'message_received', 'message_sent',\n            'llm_input', 'llm_output', 'llm_error',\n            'before_tool_call', 'after_tool_call',\n            'session_created', 'session_ended',\n            'error', 'plugin_loaded', 'plugin_unload',\n          ];\n\n          const stats: Record<string, number> = {};\n\n          await Promise.all(\n            types.map(async (type) => {\n              stats[type] = await redisClient.sCard(`${keyPrefix}type:${type}`);\n            })\n          );\n\n          let sessionCount = 0;\n          const iterator = redisClient.scanIterator({\n            MATCH: `${keyPrefix}session:*`,\n            COUNT: 100,\n          });\n\n          for await (const _ of iterator) {\n            sessionCount++;\n          }\n\n          respond(true, {\n            stats,\n            totalSessions: sessionCount,\n            redisConnected: redisClient.isOpen,\n            timestamp: Date.now(),\n          });\n        });\n\n        context.registerGatewayMethod('wegirl.health', async ({ respond }: { respond: any }) => {\n          const isHealthy = redisClient?.isOpen ?? false;\n          if (isHealthy) {\n            await redisClient.ping();\n          }\n          respond(isHealthy, {\n            status: isHealthy ? 'healthy' : 'disconnected',\n            timestamp: Date.now(),\n          });\n        });\n\n        context.registerGatewayMethod('wegirl.replies', async ({ respond, params }) => {\n          logger.info('[WeGirl] Method called: wegirl.replies');\n\n          if (!redisClient?.isOpen) {\n            respond(false, { error: 'Redis not connected' });\n            return;\n          }\n\n          try {\n            const { session, limit = 10 } = (params || {}) as { session?: string; limit?: number };\n            const keyPrefix = pluginConfig?.keyPrefix || 'openclaw:events:';\n\n            if (!session) {\n              respond(false, { error: 'Missing required parameter: session' });\n              return;\n            }\n\n            const replyListKey = `${keyPrefix}replies:${session}`;\n            const replyData = await redisClient.lRange(replyListKey, 0, Math.abs(limit) - 1);\n\n            const replies = replyData.map((item: string) => {\n              try {\n                return JSON.parse(item);\n              } catch {\n                return { raw: item };\n              }\n            });\n\n            respond(true, {\n              session,\n              replies,\n              total: replies.length,\n              timestamp: Date.now(),\n            });\n          } catch (err: any) {\n            logger.error('[WeGirl] replies method error:', err.message);\n            respond(false, { error: err.message || 'Unknown error' });\n          }\n        });\n\n        logger.info('[WeGirl] Gateway methods registered');\n      } else {\n        logger.warn('[WeGirl] registerGatewayMethod not available');\n      }\n\n      logger.info('[WeGirl] Event handlers registered');\n    } else {\n      logger.info('[WeGirl] context not available, event persistence disabled');\n      logger.info('[WeGirl] Only basic Redis connection is active');\n    }\n\n    logger.info('[WeGirl] Plugin registered successfully');\n  },\n};\n\nexport default plugin;\n",
